[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 110111011 7
1 101101100 5
2 011110001 5
3 101000110 4
4 101110010 5
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 010110001 4

56 65 111110111 8

70 07 111110011 7
